## Livewire 4 Specific Checklist
- [ ] Component uses SFC format (⚡ prefix)
- [ ] Component stored in `resources/views/components/frontend/`
- [ ] Computed properties use `#[Computed]` attribute
- [ ] Event listeners use `#[On]` attribute
- [ ] No Folio usage (using Livewire 4 routing)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for Livewire components
